gaps.description: ARCHITECTURE.md directory structure (line 127) still lists runtime/memory.js with full API docs, but the file was deleted during M101 dead file cleanup — doc is stale
ARCHITECTURE.md (line 158) lists ConfigPanel as an admin component, but it was removed — only DeviceList, HardwarePanel, LogViewer, SystemStatus exist
ARCHITECTURE.md (line 159) lists LocalModels and CloudModels as admin views, but they were removed and replaced by unified ModelsView.vue

Voice adapters (sensevoice.js, whisper.js, piper.js, openai-tts.js, openai-whisper.js, elevenlabs.js, macos-say.js, kokoro.js) listed in directory structure with one-line descriptions but lack formal API sections with function signatures in ARCHITECTURE.md

All core modules (detector/, engine/, runtime/, server/, cli/, store/, tunnel.js, config.js, index.js, ui/) are implemented matching ARCHITECTURE.md — M101 engine registry unification complete: brain.js routes through registry.resolveModel, /api/ollama/* removed, dead files deleted
